relevant_items.title: Towards Multimodal Lifelong Understanding: A Dataset and Agentic Baseline
relevant_items.reason: Directly addresses Working Memory Bottleneck and dynamic memory management for agents processing long temporal sequences, highly relevant to observational memory compression and context engineering strategies in agentctx.

relevant_items.title: Fooling AI Agents: Web-Based Indirect Prompt Injection Observed in the Wild
relevant_items.reason: Directly relevant to agentctx's security design; real-world indirect prompt injection patterns should inform input sanitization, provenance tagging, and tamper detection mechanisms.
